title: 5Pcs Super Glue with Pin Point Nozzle, Fast-Setting Thick Gel Adhesive for Hard Plastic, Rubber, Metal, Leather, DIY Crafts, Pottery, Impact Tough, Waterproof
features: Precision Bonding for Versatile Use: 5PCs super glue with pinpoint nozzle ensures accurate application on hard plastic, rubber, metal, leather, and pottery. Ideal for DIY crafts, jewelry, and repairs with a clean, spill-free finish.

Fast-Setting & Impact Tough: Thick gel cyanoacrylate glue bonds in seconds, offering high strength and durability. Waterproof and heat-resistant, it maintains strong bonds across various materials without clamping, perfect for quick fixes.

Compact & Airtight Design: Each 3g aluminum tube (8.3cm x 2.1cm) with a white plastic cap prevents drying out. The 19cm x 17.5cm x 1.5cm package (0.045kg) is easy to store, ensuring long-lasting adhesive for multiple projects.

Effortless Application for Crafts: Non-shrinking, clear-drying formula is ideal for scrapbooking, photo mounting, and decorations. Requires minimal surface prep, delivering smooth, professional results for arts and household repairs.

High-Performance Adhesive: Cures at room temperature with excellent cohesive strength, resisting flex and vibration. Long shelf life and cost-effective 5-tube pack make it a reliable choice for bonding dissimilar substrates and thicknesses.
description: Product Description Precision Bonding for Versatile Projects Achieve clean, accurate repairs with our 5PCs super glue set, designed with a pinpoint nozzle for controlled application. Perfect for bonding hard plastic, rubber, metal, leather, and pottery, it’s an essential choice for DIY crafts, jewellery making, and household fixes, delivering a mess-free finish every time. Fast-Setting, High-Strength Adhesive Our thick gel cyanoacrylate glue bonds in seconds, offering exceptional strength and durability. Waterproof and heat-resistant, it ensures long-lasting adhesion across multiple surfaces without clamping. Ideal for quick fixes, it maintains performance under flex, vibration, and everyday wear. Compact, Airtight & Long-Lasting Tubes Each 3g aluminium tube comes with a white plastic cap to prevent drying, ensuring your glue lasts longer. With a convenient 19cm x 17.5cm package size, it’s easy to store and keep on hand for multiple projects, making it perfect for frequent use in home repairs, crafts, and maintenance tasks. Effortless Application & Clear Finish Our non-shrinking, clear-drying formula requires minimal surface preparation, delivering professional results with ease. Suitable for scrapbooking, photo mounting, and delicate decorations, it’s designed for quick, clean bonding that saves you time while ensuring a strong, invisible hold. Type: Everyday Super Glue Tube Weight: 3g℮ each Material: Cyanoacrylate, Aluminium, Plastic Product Dimensions: 8.3cm x 2.1cm (LxW) Packaged Dimensions: 19cm x 17.5cm x 1.5cm Packaged Weight: 0.045kg Packaging Type: Hanging Backing Card
